name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Key Loggers
notes: Edit this BB to include all events associated with the monitoring of user activities through a key logger.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Key Loggers on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware.Keylogger
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Key Loggers on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware.Keylogger
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
